SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript: MERGE INTO DestinationTable t USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript)s ON IfNull(s.icd,"")=IfNull(t.icd,"") AND IfNull(s.icdEffectiveYear,"") = IfNull(t.icdEffectiveYear,"") WHEN MATCHED AND t.icdKey <> s.icdKey THEN  UPDATE SET icdKey = s.icdKey ,icd = s.icd ,icdCodeType = s.icdCodeType ,icdFormatted = s.icdFormatted ,icdShortDescription = s.icdShortDescription ,icdLongDescription = s.icdLongDescription ,icdDisplayDescripton = s.icdDisplayDescripton ,icdEffectiveYear = s.icdEffectiveYear ,icdEffectiveStartDate = s.icdEffectiveStartDate ,icdEffectiveEndDate = s.icdEffectiveEndDate ,isChronic = s.isChronic ,isComplete = s.isComplete WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (icdKey ,icd ,icdCodeType ,icdFormatted ,icdShortDescription ,icdLongDescription ,icdDisplayDescripton ,icdEffectiveYear ,icdEffectiveStartDate ,icdEffectiveEndDate ,isChronic ,isComplete ) VALUES (s.icdKey ,s.icd ,s.icdCodeType ,s.icdFormatted ,s.icdShortDescription ,s.icdLongDescription ,s.icdDisplayDescripton ,s.icdEffectiveYear ,s.icdEffectiveStartDate ,s.icdEffectiveEndDate ,s.isChronic ,s.isComplete)
